nodes.content: Elements related to revenue recognition, income from operations, and related performance obligation disclosures under ASC 606 and other revenue standards.
nodes.name: RevenueAndIncome

nodes.content: Revenue amounts recognized from contracts with customers and other sources, including assessed and excluded tax treatments.
nodes.name: RevenueRecognition

nodes.content: Revenue from contracts with customers excluding amounts collected on behalf of third parties (e.g., sales tax).
nodes.name: RevenueFromContractWithCustomerExcludingAssessedTax

nodes.content: Revenue from contracts with customers including taxes assessed by governmental authorities collected from customers.
nodes.name: RevenueFromContractWithCustomerIncludingAssessedTax

nodes.content: Total revenue recognized during the reporting period from all sources.
nodes.name: Revenues

nodes.content: Revenue recognized from transactions with related parties.
nodes.name: RevenueFromRelatedParties

nodes.content: Remaining performance obligations and contract liability disclosures under ASC 606.
nodes.name: PerformanceObligations

nodes.content: Transaction price allocated to remaining performance obligations that are unsatisfied or partially unsatisfied.
nodes.name: RevenueRemainingPerformanceObligation

nodes.content: Revenue recognized during the period that was included in the contract liability balance at the beginning of the period.
nodes.name: ContractWithCustomerLiabilityRevenueRecognized

nodes.content: Income or loss recognized from equity method investments.
nodes.name: EquityMethodIncome

nodes.content: Income or loss recognized from equity method investments, representing the investor's proportionate share of investee earnings.
nodes.name: IncomeLossFromEquityMethodInvestments

nodes.content: Gains and losses from extinguishment of debt and similar non-operating items.
nodes.name: GainsAndLosses

nodes.content: Net gains or losses recognized on the early extinguishment or modification of debt instruments.
nodes.name: GainsLossesOnExtinguishmentOfDebt

nodes.content: Elements related to operating expenses, cost recognition, depreciation, amortization, impairment, and restructuring charges.
nodes.name: ExpensesAndCosts

nodes.content: Depreciation of tangible assets and amortization of intangible assets and financing costs.
nodes.name: DepreciationAndAmortization

nodes.content: Depreciation expense recognized for tangible property, plant, and equipment during the reporting period.
nodes.name: Depreciation

nodes.content: Amortization expense of finite-lived intangible assets recognized during the reporting period.
nodes.name: AmortizationOfIntangibleAssets

nodes.content: Amortization of deferred financing costs (debt issuance costs) recognized as interest expense over the life of the debt.
nodes.name: AmortizationOfFinancingCosts

nodes.content: Amortization of capitalized costs to obtain or fulfill contracts with customers under ASC 340-40.
nodes.name: CapitalizedContractCostAmortization

nodes.content: Interest expense on debt and other borrowings.
nodes.name: InterestExpense

nodes.content: Total interest expense recognized during the period from all borrowings and financial obligations.
nodes.name: InterestExpense

nodes.content: Interest expense specifically attributable to debt instruments and borrowings.
nodes.name: InterestExpenseDebt

nodes.content: Asset impairment charges including goodwill impairment losses.
nodes.name: ImpairmentCharges

nodes.content: Impairment charges recognized for long-lived assets when carrying value exceeds fair value.
nodes.name: AssetImpairmentCharges

nodes.content: Impairment loss recognized when the carrying amount of a reporting unit's goodwill exceeds its implied fair value.
nodes.name: GoodwillImpairmentLoss

nodes.content: Restructuring charges and expected costs associated with restructuring activities.
nodes.name: RestructuringCosts

nodes.content: Restructuring charges recognized during the period for employee termination benefits, facility closures, and contract terminations.
nodes.name: RestructuringCharges

nodes.content: Total expected cost of a restructuring plan, including severance, facility exit costs, and other charges.
nodes.name: RestructuringAndRelatedCostExpectedCost1

nodes.content: Legacy lease and rental expense disclosures under ASC 840.
nodes.name: LeaseAndRentalExpense

nodes.name: LeaseAndRentalExpense

nodes.name: OperatingLeasesRentExpenseNet

nodes.content: Costs recognized for defined contribution retirement plans.
nodes.name: DefinedContributionPlanCosts

nodes.content: Cost recognized for employer contributions to defined contribution retirement plans (e.g., 401(k)).
nodes.name: DefinedContributionPlanCostRecognized

nodes.content: Prior year claims and claims adjustment expenses for property-casualty insurance underwriters.
nodes.name: InsuranceUnderwriting

nodes.content: Elements related to tangible and intangible assets, goodwill, real estate properties, equity method investments, and fair value disclosures.
nodes.name: Assets

nodes.name: Goodwill

nodes.content: Finite-lived intangible assets and their useful life characteristics.
nodes.name: IntangibleAssets

nodes.content: Estimated useful life of a finite-lived intangible asset used for amortization purposes.
nodes.name: FiniteLivedIntangibleAssetUsefulLife

nodes.content: Tangible long-lived asset useful life and real estate property disclosures.
nodes.name: PropertyPlantAndEquipment

nodes.content: Estimated useful life of property, plant, and equipment used for depreciation purposes.
nodes.name: PropertyPlantAndEquipmentUsefulLife

nodes.content: Area (in square feet or other unit of measure) of real estate property owned or leased by the entity.
nodes.name: AreaOfRealEstateProperty

nodes.content: Number of real estate properties owned, leased, or managed by the entity.

nodes.content: Investments accounted for under the equity method and ownership percentages.
nodes.name: EquityMethodInvestments

nodes.name: EquityMethodInvestments

nodes.content: Percentage of ownership interest in an investee accounted for under the equity method.

nodes.content: Cash and cash equivalents fair value measurement disclosures.

nodes.content: Tax-related operating loss carryforwards recognized as deferred tax assets.
nodes.name: OperatingLossCarryforwards

nodes.content: Elements related to contract liabilities, contingent consideration, guarantee obligations, and environmental accruals.
nodes.name: Liabilities

nodes.name: ContractLiabilities

nodes.name: ContractWithCustomerLiability

nodes.content: Accruals for environmental loss contingencies and remediation obligations.
nodes.name: EnvironmentalLiabilities

nodes.content: Accrued liability for environmental loss contingencies including remediation and cleanup obligations.
nodes.name: AccrualForEnvironmentalLossContingencies

nodes.content: Maximum exposure under guarantee obligations and similar commitments.
nodes.name: GuaranteeObligations

nodes.content: Maximum potential undiscounted future payments under guarantee obligations.
nodes.name: GuaranteeObligationsMaximumExposure

nodes.content: Elements related to common stock, preferred stock, share characteristics, dividends, and non-controlling interests.
nodes.name: StockholdersEquity

nodes.content: Common stock attributes including par value, authorized shares, and outstanding shares.
nodes.name: CommonStock

nodes.name: CommonStockSharesAuthorized

nodes.content: Number of common shares outstanding as of the balance sheet date, excluding treasury shares.
nodes.name: CommonStockSharesOutstanding

nodes.content: Number of common shares reserved for future issuance under equity compensation plans, warrants, and convertible instruments.
nodes.name: CommonStockCapitalSharesReservedForFutureIssuance

nodes.content: Preferred stock attributes including authorized shares and dividend rate.
nodes.name: PreferredStock

nodes.content: Stated dividend rate percentage on preferred stock as specified in the corporate charter.

nodes.content: Dividends declared per share for common stock.
nodes.name: Dividends

nodes.name: CommonStockDividendsPerShareDeclared

nodes.content: Ownership percentages held by non-controlling owners and parent entities.
nodes.name: NoncontrollingInterests

nodes.name: MinorityInterestOwnershipPercentageByNoncontrollingOwners

nodes.content: Percentage of ownership interest held by the parent company in a consolidated subsidiary.
nodes.name: MinorityInterestOwnershipPercentageByParent

nodes.content: Cumulative effect adjustments from adoption of new accounting principles.
nodes.name: AccountingPrincipleAdoption

nodes.content: Cumulative effect adjustment to retained earnings from the adoption of a new accounting standard.

nodes.content: Elements related to debt instruments, lines of credit, financing costs, and debt measurements including face amount, carrying amount, interest rates, and maturity.
nodes.name: DebtInstruments

nodes.content: Net carrying amount of a debt instrument on the balance sheet, including unamortized premium or discount.
nodes.name: DebtInstrumentCarryingAmount

nodes.content: Face (par) amount of the debt instrument as stated in the agreement.
nodes.name: DebtInstrumentFaceAmount

nodes.content: Estimated fair value of the debt instrument, typically disclosed for financial instruments carried at amortized cost.
nodes.name: DebtInstrumentFairValue

nodes.content: Total carrying amount of long-term debt obligations on the balance sheet.
nodes.name: LongTermDebt

nodes.content: Estimated fair value of long-term debt, typically disclosed under ASC 825 fair value of financial instruments.
nodes.name: LongTermDebtFairValue

nodes.content: Stated, effective, variable basis spread, and weighted average interest rates on debt.
nodes.name: DebtInterestRates

nodes.content: Contractual stated (coupon) interest rate on the debt instrument.
nodes.name: DebtInstrumentInterestRateStatedPercentage

nodes.content: Effective interest rate on the debt instrument, reflecting the yield including discounts, premiums, and issuance costs.
nodes.name: DebtInstrumentInterestRateEffectivePercentage

nodes.content: Weighted average interest rate across all outstanding debt instruments.
nodes.name: DebtWeightedAverageInterestRate

nodes.content: Maturity dates, terms, redemption prices, and convertible conversion prices of debt instruments.

nodes.name: DebtInstrumentRedemptionPricePercentage

nodes.content: Line of credit facilities including maximum capacity, current borrowing capacity, remaining capacity, interest rates, and commitment fees.

nodes.content: Elements related to operating and finance lease disclosures including right-of-use assets, lease liabilities, lease costs, and weighted average terms under ASC 842.
